Headline: #44 Wallace/Racine Temporary Reroute at Wallace/35th
ShortDescription: #44 Wallace/Racine buses are temp. rerouted in both directions due to construction near Wallace/35th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#44 Wallace/Racine buses temp. rerouted near Wallace/35th.

Northbound buses will operate via Wallace, 35th, Halsted, 31st and Wallace including the normal route streets.

Southbound buses will operate via Wallace, 31st, Halsted, 35th and Wallace.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Wallace/35th.

Headline: #65 Grand Temporary Reroute at Grand/Pulaski
ShortDescription: 65 Grand buses are temporarily rerouted via Grand, Pulaski, Division, Hamlin and Grand due to, street blockage near Grand/Pulaski.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#65 Grand buses are temporarily rerouted via Grand, Pulaski, Division, Hamlin and Grand due to, street blockage near Grand/Pulaski.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #151 Sheridan Temporary Northbound Reroute near Sheridan/Wilson
ShortDescription: Northbound 151 Sheridan buses are temporarily rerouted, due to street blockage near Sheridan/Wilson.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Northbound #151 Sheridan buses are temporarily rerouted via Sheridan, Montrose, Clarendon, Lawrence, then resume their normal route on Sheridan, due to street blockage near Sheridan/Wilson.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #147 Outer Drive Express and #151 Sheridan Temporary Southbound Reroute near Sheridan/Glenlake
ShortDescription: Southbound #147 Outer Drive Express and #151 Sheridan buses are temporarily rerouted, due to street blockage near Sheridan/Glenlake.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #147 Outer Drive Express and #151 Sheridan buses are temporarily rerouted via Sheridan, Granville, Broadway, Thorndale, then resume their normal route on Sheridan, due to street blockage near Sheridan/Glenlake.

Southbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
